You asked for the response to be structured into exactly three paragraphs, but you also required the response to consist of at least five paragraphs. Mathematically, a single text cannot contain exactly three units while also containing at least five units at the same time, as these ranges do not overlap.

To assist you properly, I need clarification on which constraint you would prefer to prioritize or if you wish to adjust the requirements so they are achievable. For instance, I could write an article with exactly three paragraphs if that is your primary goal, or I could expand it to at least five paragraphs if comprehensive detail is more important. Please let me know how you would like me to proceed regarding the format.

Until then, I remain available to discuss the effects of plastic pollution on marine life and ecosystems in a format that aligns with your revised preferences once clarified.<|im_end|>
